title: Add backend tests for share/fork endpoints
description: In tests/test_chat_history_router.py (or new test file) add tests: (1) share session - owner can share, non-owner gets 403. (2) get shared session - non-owner can access shared session, cannot access non-shared session (404). (3) fork session - authenticated user can fork a shared session, gets new session with copied messages. (4) unshare - after unsharing, non-owner gets 404.

title: Add share/unshare UI and read-only mode
description: In ChatPage.tsx header area: (1) If user is owner (isOwner=true): show 'Share' button that calls shareSession(id, true), copies URL to clipboard, shows snackbar confirmation. If already shared, show 'Unshare' button. (2) If user is NOT owner (isOwner=false, shared session): render chat in read-only mode (disable input, show info banner 'This is a shared chat by <owner>'), show 'Fork to continue' button that calls forkSession(), navigates to new session. (3) If getSession returns 404/error for a URL-based sessionId: show 'Chat not found or not shared with you' message.

title: Add URL routing for chat sessions
description: In App.tsx add route: /finngenie/chat/:sessionId -> ChatPage. In ChatPage.tsx: (1) read sessionId from useParams, (2) on mount, if sessionId is present, load that session via getSession (which now handles shared access), (3) use useNavigate to update URL when user selects/creates sessions (push /finngenie/chat/{id}), (4) when no session selected, URL is /finngenie. Keep existing / and /finngenie routes working as before.

title: Add frontend API functions for share/fork
description: In chatHistoryApi.ts add: (1) shareSession(sessionId, shared: boolean) - PUT to /chat/sessions/{id}/share. (2) forkSession(sessionId) - POST to /chat/sessions/{id}/fork, returns new session object. (3) Update getSession() to map new 'is_owner' and 'shared' fields. (4) Update SessionDetail type to include isOwner: boolean, shared: boolean.

title: Add share/fork backend API endpoints
description: In routers/chat_history.py add: (1) PUT /chat/sessions/{session_id}/share - auth_required, toggles shared flag (body: {shared: bool}), returns 403 if not owner. (2) POST /chat/sessions/{session_id}/fork - auth_required, forks session for current user, returns new session ID. (3) Modify GET /chat/sessions/{session_id} to use get_session_for_access - returns session if owned OR shared, include 'is_owner' and 'shared' fields in SessionDetailResponse. Return 404 if not accessible.

title: Add fork_session DB method
description: In chat_history_db.py add fork_session(source_session_id, target_user_id) that: (1) verifies source session is shared, (2) creates a new session owned by target_user_id with copied title (prefixed 'Fork of: '), (3) copies all chat_messages with new UUIDs but same content/role/order. Return the new ChatSession. Do NOT copy attachments for now (complexity).

title: Add DB methods for sharing and access control
description: In chat_history_db.py add: (1) set_shared(session_id, user_id, shared: bool) - sets shared flag, verifies user owns session. (2) get_session_for_access(session_id, user_id) - returns ChatSession + is_owner flag; returns session if user owns it OR if shared=1; raises/returns None otherwise. Update ChatSession dataclass to include 'shared' field.

title: Add shared column migration to chat_sessions table
description: Add 'shared' BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0 column to chat_sessions in _init_db() migration section of genetics-mcp-server/src/genetics_mcp_server/db/chat_history_db.py. Follow existing migration pattern (check if column exists, ALTER TABLE if not).

title: Feature: Chat Sharing with URL Routing
description: Add shareable chat URLs so each chat session has a unique URL (based on chat ID). By default, chats are private. Users can 'share this chat' to copy a shareable link. Unsharing should also be available. Show proper messages when accessing unshared chats. Consider allowing continuation of shared chats (requires DB work). Frontend is genetics-results-browser, backend is genetics-mcp-server.
